mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.store_id, r.user_number, r.category, r.review_content, r.rating, r.created_date, r.modified_date, u.user_name AS nickname, u.profile_image AS profileImage, s.store_name AS storeName, (SELECT IFNULL(AVG(r2.rating), 0) FROM reviews r2 WHERE r2.store_id = #{storeId}) AS averageRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r2 WHERE r2.store_id = #{storeId}) AS reviewCount FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_number = u.user_number JOIN stores s ON r.store_id = s.store_id WHERE r.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY r.created_date DESC

SELECT r.review_id, r.review_content, r.category AS review_category, r.rating AS review_rating, r.created_date, r.modified_date, s.store_name AS shop_name, r.store_id AS storeId FROM reviews r JOIN stores s ON r.store_id = s.store_id WHERE r.user_number = #{userNumber} ORDER BY r.created_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( store_id, user_number, category, review_content, rating, created_date, modified_date ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userNumber}, #{category}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating}, NOW(), NOW() )
INSERT INTO bookmark (user_number, storeId, prefer) VALUES (#{userNumber}, #{storeId}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, store_address AS storeAddress, store_phone AS storePhone FROM stores WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
